condition: component code Maps-to a standard concept with domain_id='Measurement' and the component carries a numeric value (e.g. blood pressure 85354-9 splits into 8480-6 systolic + 8462-4 diastolic).
narrative_md:
Sibling edge to `Observation__measurement` that expands `Observation.component[]`. The view does `forEach: component` so each component becomes one staging row in `staging.observation_component`; the shared `mapspec/etl/_resolve_observation_component.sql` pass walks the component code through `cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab` → Maps-to → standard concept once (no longer LOINC-hardcoded) and tags `std_domain`, so this edge is a trivial `WHERE std_domain='Measurement' AND component_value_num IS NOT NULL` filter. Surrogate `measurement_id = stringToId(Observation.id || '/' || component_code || '|' || std_concept_id)` keeps each (parent, component-code, standard concept) unique and distinct from top-level measurement ids.

Without this edge, component data (the actual systolic/diastolic numbers of a BP reading) was silently dropped. Synthea emits ~2,650 Observations with `component`; this edge captures the inner measurements they carry.

fields.notes: LOINC → standard Measurement concept via vocab.concept_relationship 'Maps to'.
Numeric only — coded components route to observation, not measurement.
Copied from the parent Observation — components share the parent's timing.

references.notes: HL7 IG draft StructureMap — does not specify component fan-out; this edge fills that gap.
